creator: catacombae@gmail.com
text:
Maybe I'm misunderstanding the expected format of the patch, because when I apply it straight to the source tree in the sysutils/hfsexplorer port it succeeds both in the updated ports tree (updated today with portsnap) and in a git clone (from https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports):

$ patch -p1 < hfsexplorer-2021.10.9.patch 
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff -ur hfsexplorer/Makefile hfsexplorer.new/Makefile
|--- hfsexplorer/Makefile	2022-09-08 00:06:12.000000000 +0300
|+++ hfsexplorer.new/Makefile	2022-12-09 21:48:13.348021000 +0200
--------------------------
Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hunk #2 succeeded at 24.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff -ur hfsexplorer/distinfo hfsexplorer.new/distinfo
|--- hfsexplorer/distinfo	2018-02-25 03:58:45.000000000 +0200
|+++ hfsexplorer.new/distinfo	2022-12-09 21:44:30.933980000 +0200
--------------------------
Patching file distinfo using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff -ur hfsexplorer/pkg-plist hfsexplorer.new/pkg-plist
|--- hfsexplorer/pkg-plist	2018-02-25 03:58:45.000000000 +0200
|+++ hfsexplorer.new/pkg-plist	2022-12-09 21:40:22.217219000 +0200
--------------------------
Patching file pkg-plist using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
done
$ shasum hfsexplorer-2021.10.9.patch 
cbc280dce2c9a283aed5d1619abeeacedee5ae8d  hfsexplorer-2021.10.9.patch
